title: Zapier with quickbooks online is not passing column value
excerpt:
Using Zapier to connect to quickbooks. I am getting strange values in my columns. 
columnTitle: 
Job # 
value 
value: new text 
New text is not a column value at all. Does anyone know why this is?

posts.author: chekmate (Timothy Eberly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using Zapier to connect to quickbooks. I am getting strange values in my columns.

columnTitle:
Job #
value
value: new text

New text is not a column value at all. Does anyone know why this is?
